name: Vanta Stale Active Accounts (90 days)
description: Detects active vanta accounts with no recent login activity for 90 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.last_login_at AS last_login FROM vanta_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (u.last_login_at IS NULL OR u.last_login_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days')
remediation: Review stale accounts and disable or deprovision access if no valid business need exists.
